{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322064410BEEEF573B7B76146B068"}"},"total":3561},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529187955154322238","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"抱歉作者晚来的五星，一本很好看的书，哪怕没有强大的力量也会拼尽一切，在我眼里每一个林纾都是独特的，但他们的心不变，他们是正义的，勇敢的不会因为一些困难而放弃。他们无惧死亡，每一个人都有决心。希望更多人能看下去，也希望作者能继续写下去，给所有的读者一份满意的答卷！一份完美的答卷！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753030440,"group_id":"7441479330774928446","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"『over fate』吾将超越命运，打破那命定的终局!","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4vBauWnJK+cmACk1dHkBU+F+Tbg2jU15ZNIEcR0b/vX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/74fd5cd4cb78448cbb3c0a5a9081b4e4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710588&x-signature=tJeXrCzwCF1HA9MLUfaE6bSm%2Bdo%3D","user_id":"2643690206528046","user_name":"★我是黄泉的狗★"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2643690206528046","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441479330774928446","book_info":{"abstract":"林纾们穿越了。
只是，他的穿越，有那么一点点问题……
他，再同一时间，同时穿越了数个奥特世界。
怎么会是分裂出的人格进行穿越呢？
然而，不等他们想明白怎么会这样。
他们所处的世界，却先一步，逐渐揭开了神秘的面纱。
没有高斯赛罗的奥特曼传奇世界；
被黑化赛罗入侵的艾克斯世界；
没有奥特曼存在的凯撒贝利亚帝国；
路基艾尔乱入到原生之初的世界……
再多个世界同时艰难求生后，林纾们逐渐发现了。
他们所处的，都是被错乱的时间线。
而他们，能依靠的，除了想尽一切办法搞到的光之外，就只有从敌人们哪里坑来的力量了。
“你有力量吗？有的话，来当我的好兄弟吧！一辈子的那种！”
“什么，你问你为什么走不了了，力量还拿不回去了？”
“开什么玩笑，你不是白送给我的吗？”
“借了力量了，还想要要回力量，哪有这么好的事情！”
就这么，林纾们再诈骗，吃干抹净黑暗这条路上，越走越远了……
多年后。
路西法，扎基，梅菲斯特，基里艾洛德人……等一众牢伙伴们想到被迫洗白的那段日子，都流下来感动的泪水……
“什么黑暗？那不都是我的挚爱亲朋，手足兄弟吗？”
“我，林纾，穿越以来只干三件事。”
“认义父，当吕布，方天画戟捅义父！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4f5cc5f9114a79915007a673219cfe0e","author":"轻饮浊酒，愁上头","author_id":"","book_id":"7441479330774928446","book_name":"分身叠加羁绊，我，最强合成奥","book_short_name":"光之回响","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7441479604717486654","read_count":"43920","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2105906"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"691","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0da8de9ee33a948b1511abe4cc165e2b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317050&x-signature=EfHmz7rpMIi%2FD4823%2F13EZr9HhQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1138721709635943","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1631"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322064410BEEEF573B7B76146B068"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读79小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":251060,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":283309,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7873},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540851985039377177","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是偏欢乐向的奥特精神，主角经常燃烧梅菲斯特来照亮光明。（牢梅:你怎么那么自私？）
暴躁纾是真正的二哥，拥有最强烈的奥特精神，以德凯之躯硬刷海帕，而且和25仔一样奥特逃婚。（十分经典）
路痴纾以海闪杰顿，拼着性命告诉了路基艾尔，银河的理念的正确，给了原生之处一个好的结局。
我就起了这个，大脑内存不足了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755747294,"group_id":"7441479330774928446","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书籍太长，我命太短","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx5xe4Ct+vRqYh7EpSaJZsALk4P8tsl9QNifeS7KEBvl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1f4589e07f4e4445a2fa93de3751b704~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703967&x-signature=Nld%2BR3YZ7bKclIq3o1GaSqUZ2l8%3D","user_id":"1394632270029527","user_name":"紫龙骑士砂糖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1394632270029527","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441479330774928446","book_info":{"abstract":"林纾们穿越了。

“认义父，当吕布，方天画戟捅义父！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4f5cc5f9114a79915007a673219cfe0e","author":"轻饮浊酒，愁上头","author_id":"","book_id":"7441479330774928446","book_name":"分身叠加羁绊，我，最强合成奥","book_short_name":"光之回响","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7441479604717486654","read_count":"43920","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2105906"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"691","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0da8de9ee33a948b1511abe4cc165e2b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317050&x-signature=EfHmz7rpMIi%2FD4823%2F13EZr9HhQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1138721709635943","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"102"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322064410BEEEF573B7B76146B068"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":208,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":25001,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":114606,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":27491},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7596986485495169816","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"全书总结:真是一对苦命鸳鸯！[哭]

:认真的讲的话，那就是主角燃烧自己，靠着
一个死而复生技能，一直战斗，和伙伴们一起战
斗，打着打着突然喊着友情啊，羁绊啊，希望啊，什么的开始极限爆种，我个人是挺喜欢这种战斗爽，没毒点的小说，关键是还能看到恶势力们被迫善堕，然后不可自拔的成为善人，真的是想想都让人兴奋啊！
作者也知道写爱情故事容易崩，所以这方面没怎么写。
真的是一个挺好的小说，哪怕是数据差了，没多少人看了，他也没有选择太监，反而是很认真的在写剧情，为我们努力留下一个不留遗憾的大结局。
像这种不太监又不肯水剧情的绝世好作者，我只能说，祝他的全家都身体健康，万事都如意，买彩票必须中大奖。[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768814936,"group_id":"7441479330774928446","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3268174904043291"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441479330774928446","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"578"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读51小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":422,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":183256,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7485773234909512472","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说好呢，这本爱情小说感觉是很好的一本了，男频小说里的极品！
男主和梅菲斯特的爱恨情仇很果人，
虽然青梅竹马也很多，但是戏份没过分抢女主的剧情，
内容讲的是，在未来的高科技时代的男主角有一天佩戴上脑机设备中，但是突发以外，被漏电刺激，臆想症发病了，幻想自己人格分裂穿越异世界沉浸在其中，无法离开脑机世界，
傲娇女主角梅菲斯特不离不弃，冒着生命危险佩戴脑机接口，拯救爱人的故事，两人这后有情人终成眷属，男主角醒了病情好转，和女主角梅菲斯特，还有那个金发双马尾的青梅竹马卡欧斯也一起跟上了幸福的生活。
故事很感人，尤其是男主角到死都不肯放弃梅菲斯特的片段，两人最后重归于好，极限反杀最终boss，真的是让人泪目。[哭][哭][哭]","text_exts":[{"e":55,"s":51,"text":"青梅竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741330506146B068%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227485773234909512472%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227441479330774928446%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742921483,"group_id":"7441479330774928446","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwh93RV77jo4KIlSeTf48BorUX9MKH18QDdIfdokc0Z5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6d79fae707bf48049ecd421f88b306cf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702964&x-signature=q6i7O80zSE79B9Ds0DCsRvS2m%2BQ%3D","user_id":"3268174904043291","user_name":"Raze·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3268174904043291","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441479330774928446","book_info":{"abstract":"林纾们穿越了。

多年后。
